title: astragalus newberryi var. blyae
intro: Astragalus newberryi var. blyae, also known as Bly's milkvetch, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus newberryi var. blyae can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
